'''ây-v-r''' ('''yavara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unadhere|unadhere]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-v-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unadhere|unadhere]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-v-r
|-
! Lemma
| yavara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yavarithi|yavarithi]] || [[word:yavariji|yavariji]] || [[word:yavarishi|yavarishi]] || [[word:yavari|yavari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yavaruthuth|yavaruthuth]] || [[word:yavarujuj|yavarujuj]] || [[word:yavarushush|yavarushush]] || [[word:yavar|yavar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yavaruthu|yavaruthu]] || [[word:yavaruju|yavaruju]] || [[word:yavarushu|yavarushu]] || [[word:yavaru|yavaru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yavarufuth|yavarufuth]] || [[word:yavarufuj|yavarufuj]] || [[word:yavarufush|yavarufush]] || [[word:yavaruf|yavaruf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yavarethe|yavarethe]] || [[word:yavareje|yavareje]] || [[word:yavareshe|yavareshe]] || [[word:yavare|yavare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yavarothoth|yavarothoth]] || [[word:yavarojoj|yavarojoj]] || [[word:yavaroshosh|yavaroshosh]] || [[word:yavar|yavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yavarotho|yavarotho]] || [[word:yavarojo|yavarojo]] || [[word:yavarosho|yavarosho]] || [[word:yavaro|yavaro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yavarofoth|yavarofoth]] || [[word:yavarofoj|yavarofoj]] || [[word:yavarofosh|yavarofosh]] || [[word:yavarof|yavarof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yavarĂŠthĂŠ|yavarĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yavarĂŠjĂŠ|yavarĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yavarĂŠshĂŠ|yavarĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yavarĂŠ|yavarĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yavarathath|yavarathath]] || [[word:yavarajaj|yavarajaj]] || [[word:yavarashash|yavarashash]] || [[word:yavar|yavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yavaratha|yavaratha]] || [[word:yavaraja|yavaraja]] || [[word:yavarasha|yavarasha]] || [[word:yavara|yavara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yavarafath|yavarafath]] || [[word:yavarafaj|yavarafaj]] || [[word:yavarafash|yavarafash]] || [[word:yavaraf|yavaraf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yavarasha|yavarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyavarasha|goyavarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyavarasha|gokiyavarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yavarnĂŒsha|yavarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyavarnknĂŒsha|goyavarnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyavarnĂŒsha|gokiyavarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yavarshĂ«sha|yavarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyavarnkshĂ«sha|goyavarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyavarshĂ«sha|gokiyavarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yavarosha|yavarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyavarnkrosha|goyavarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyavarosha|gokiyavarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yavarmusha|yavarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyavarnkmusha|goyavarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyavarmusha|gokiyavarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yavarsherasha|yavarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyavarnksherasha|goyavarnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyavarsherasha|gokiyavarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yavarngasha|yavarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyavarnkngasha|goyavarnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyavarngasha|gokiyavarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yavaryasha|yavaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyavarnkyasha|goyavarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyavaryasha|gokiyavaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yavaryamasha|yavaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyavarnkyamasha|goyavarnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyavaryamasha|gokiyavaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yavarnĂŒshĂ«sha|yavarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyavarnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goyavarnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyavarnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiyavarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yavarnĂŒrosha|yavarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyavarnknĂŒrosha|goyavarnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyavarnĂŒrosha|gokiyavarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yavarnĂŒmusha|yavarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyavarnknĂŒmusha|goyavarnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyavarnĂŒmusha|gokiyavarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yavarshĂ«nĂŒsha|yavarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyavarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goyavarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyavarshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiyavarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yavarshĂ«rosha|yavarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyavarnkshĂ«rosha|goyavarnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyavarshĂ«rosha|gokiyavarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yavarshĂ«musha|yavarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyavarnkshĂ«musha|goyavarnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyavarshĂ«musha|gokiyavarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yavaronĂŒsha|yavaronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyavarnkronĂŒsha|goyavarnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyavaronĂŒsha|gokiyavaronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yavaroshĂ«sha|yavaroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyavarnkroshĂ«sha|goyavarnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyavaroshĂ«sha|gokiyavaroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yavaromusha|yavaromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyavarnkromusha|goyavarnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyavaromusha|gokiyavaromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yavarmunĂŒsha|yavarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyavarnkmunĂŒsha|goyavarnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyavarmunĂŒsha|gokiyavarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yavarmushĂ«sha|yavarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyavarnkmushĂ«sha|goyavarnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyavarmushĂ«sha|gokiyavarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yavarmurosha|yavarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyavarnkmurosha|goyavarnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyavarmurosha|gokiyavarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yavar|yavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yĂŠvĂŠr|yĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyavar|hoyavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyĂŠvĂŠr|hoyĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyavar|hohoyavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyĂŠvĂŠr|hohoyĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒyavar|nĂŒyavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒyĂŠvĂŠr|nĂŒyĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyavar|nĂŒnĂŒyavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠvĂŠr|nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻyavar|nĂŻyavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻyĂŠvĂŠr|nĂŻyĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyavar|nĂŻnĂŻyavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠvĂŠr|nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyavar|luyavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyĂŠvĂŠr|luyĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyavar|luluyavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyĂŠvĂŠr|luluyĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyavar|liyavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyĂŠvĂŠr|liyĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyavar|liliyavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyĂŠvĂŠr|liliyĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyavar|koyavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyĂŠvĂŠr|koyĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyavar|kokoyavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyĂŠvĂŠr|kokoyĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyavar|keyavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyĂŠvĂŠr|keyĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyavar|kekeyavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyĂŠvĂŠr|kekeyĂŠvĂŠr]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
